news.title: Anthropic wins injunction against Trump administration over Defense Department saga
news.summary: A federal judge has ordered that the Trump administration rescind recent restrictions it placed on the AI company.

news.title: You can now transfer your chats and personal information from other chatbots directly into Gemini
news.summary: Google is launching "switching tools" that, just as it sounds, will make it easier for users of other chatbots to switch to Gemini.

news.title: Wikipedia cracks down on the use of AI in article writing
news.summary: The site, whose policies are subject to change, has struggled with the issue of AI-generated writing.

news.title: OpenAI abandons yet another side quest: ChatGPT’s erotic mode
news.summary: It's only the latest of several side projects that the AI startup has ditched over the past week.

news.title: Data centers get ready — the Senate wants to see your power bills
news.summary: Senators Josh Hawley and Elizabeth Warren want the Energy Information Administration to gather more details about how data centers use power — and how that affects the grid.

news.title: ByteDance’s new AI video generation model, Dreamina Seedance 2.0, comes to CapCut
news.summary: The new model in CapCut will have built-in protections for making video from real faces or unauthorized intellectual property.
